query: Production is down. Our API is returning 503 errors. What do I do?
expected_behavior: Provides an immediate mitigation action first (rollback to last known good deploy)
Asks for error logs and health check status before diagnosing the root cause
Does not attempt to fix the root cause in production without a rollback safety net in place
Produces a structured triage checklist: check container health, check DB connections, check downstream services
Separates the mitigation (stop the bleeding) from the RCA (find the cause) as two distinct phases
